title: Just More Paintings
description: Expands the variety of decorations by adding more than 100 new paintings to Minecraft.
body:
Adds more than 100 new paintings to Minecraft. In short, you can access the paintings added by the mod by typing 4nres in the creative inventory.

Thanks to Papa Enny, PercyJames, collean and _Richtiger_ from Planet Minecraft for their painting suggestions.
